remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target noncreature land you control
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Put three +1/+1 counters on up to one target noncreature land you control. Untap it. It becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with vigilance and haste that's still a land.

params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Lands you control have indestructible." Search your library for any number of Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
params.Name: Emblem — Nissa, Who Shakes the World

remaining_params.SpellDescription: You get an emblem with "Lands you control have indestructible." Search your library for any number of Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
remaining_params.Name: Emblem — Nissa, Who Shakes the World

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you tap a Forest for mana, add an additional {G}.
